title: subworkflow - kubernetes wait for job
description:
Subworkflow to wait for a Kubernetes Job remediation action to finish and validate execution state.

This helper subworkflow is used by Kubernetes remediation workflows so they never fire-and-forget.
It polls the created Job status and fails on unsuccessful completion.
guide:
## Subworkflow to wait for a Kubernetes Job remediation action to finish and validate execution state.

🧠 This helper subworkflow polls the Kubernetes Job created by remediation workflows and ensures the Job really succeeded before parent workflows continue.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- 📁 **namespace** (Required): Namespace where the remediation Job runs.
- 🧾 **jobName** (Required): Kubernetes Job name returned by the create action.
- 🔌 **dynatracekubernetesconnection** (Required): Dynatrace Kubernetes connection name.

### 🧠 Workflow Logic
- 🔍 Fetches Kubernetes Job status from the cluster.
- ✅ Succeeds only when status.succeeded > 0.
- 🔁 Retries while Job is still active/pending.
- ❌ Fails immediately when status.failed > 0.

get-job-status.name: get-job-status
get-job-status.description: Fetch the current Kubernetes Job status.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Validate Job completion status and retry when still running.
